name: The Elation Game
desc:
The activation and effects of this card cannot be negated. Cards and effects cannot be activated in response to this card’s activation.
If this card would leave the field by a card effect, inflict 1000 damage to the player who activated that effect instead.
When this card is activated, or during each Standby Phase: The turn player rolls a six-sided die, then applies the result.
● 1: Gain 1000 LP, also monsters you control gain 1000 ATK until the end of this turn.
● 2: Draw 1 card.
● 3: You can conduct 2 Normal Summons/Sets this turn.
● 4: Draw 2 cards.
● 5: You can negate 1 effect activated by your opponent this turn.
● 6: Add 1 card from your Deck to your hand.
You can only use this effect of "The Elation Game" once per turn.
